title: Incorrect return type in Code Node
symptom: The Code Node returns '[object Object]' instead of the expected array of strings.
applies_when: Using a Code Node to process input strings
not_this_if: The output is correctly formatted as an array of strings
root_cause: The original implementation incorrectly attempts to stringify and parse the array, which results in an object being returned instead of the desired array format. This leads to the output being displayed as '[object Object]'.
fix_steps: Replace the return statement with 'return [{ json: { output: $input.first().json.text.split("\n") } }];'
Remove any unnecessary stringify and parse operations.
agent_instruction: Update the Code Node to directly return the split array without stringify and parse.
